kpi.prompt: Anzahl freigegebener Retouren, die auf eine Wareneingangs-Prüfung warten; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT rsi.return_shipment_id) AS awaiting_goods_receipt_check_count
FROM return_shipment_items rsi
JOIN return_shipments rs
  ON rs.return_shipment_id = rsi.return_shipment_id
WHERE
  rsi.status = 'released'
  AND rs.status = 'released'
  AND rs.progress_status = 'geprueft'
  AND rs.is_sent = FALSE
  AND rsi.sales_order_item_id IS NOT NULL
  AND rsi.return_shipment_id IS NOT NULL;

en.title: Returns to review
en.description: Released return orders waiting for a quality check decision.

de.title: Retouren zu prüfen
de.description: Freigegebene Retouren, die auf eine Wareneingangs-Prüfung warten.
